metadata.notes: Iteration-2: cmp-dev agent (nornspun-client) vs iteration-1 frontend-dev skill. Key question: does the agent format enforce wiki-query where the skill allowed bail-out?

expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Full retrieval pipeline: hot.md scan, index pass, 3 full page reads — [[Compose Side Effects]], [[Coroutines in Compose]], [[Compose Recomposition and Stability]].

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query 'Compose LaunchedEffect key recomposition side effects' matches routing table entry verbatim.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites 3 wiki pages by name. Quotes rules directly from page content.

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Diagnoses key-changes-on-keystroke root cause; provides Unit fix; explains why passwordValue must not be a key.

notes: KEY DIFFERENCE from iteration-1: iteration-1 (skill) bailed out before retrieval (0.50 pass rate). Iteration-2 (agent) executed the full pipeline (1.00). The agent definition's Two-Mode framing and explicit 'run wiki-query before answering' instruction enforced the retrieval.

expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Full retrieval: hot.md pre-check found direct hit, grep identified 4 candidate pages, all 4 read in full.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query 'Turbine awaitItem awaitComplete testIn turbineScope StateFlow' matches routing table entry verbatim.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites all 4 wiki pages by name including wiki's '#1 gotcha' framing and Kotest BehaviorSpec bug (#3577).

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Diagnoses all 3 root causes: Dispatchers.Main not replaced, stateIn not activated, StateFlow conflation. Gives canonical fix.

expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Full retrieval: index pass identified 4 candidates, all 4 read including project-specific Nornspun conventions page.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query 'SQLDelight asFlow mapToList coroutines dispatcher requirements' matches routing table entry verbatim.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites 4 pages including project page [[Nornspun Kotlin KMP Conventions]] with version pin (2.3.2) and project convention (asFlow().mapToList(Dispatchers.IO)).

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: End-to-end walkthrough: schema → repository → ViewModel → composable. Explains table-listener reactive update path.

expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Full retrieval: hot.md pre-check, index pass, 3 full page reads + grep pass on MVI Pattern page — 5 pages total.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query 'Navigation 3 CMP NavDisplay back stack type-safe SavedStateConfiguration' matches routing table entry verbatim.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites 5 pages by name. Incorporates alpha05 dependency coords, SavedStateConfiguration polymorphic serializer requirement, wiki-documented open question on MVI+Nav3.

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Covers both requirements: type-safe NavKey sealed interface and process-death survival via SavedStateConfiguration (not JVM-only reflection overload).

notes: Iteration-2 achieves 16/16 (100%) vs iteration-1's 14/16 (87.5%). The +0.125 delta is entirely from eval-1 (LaunchedEffect).

The agent format fixed the bail-out failure mode: iteration-1 skill loaded wiki-query but decided the answer was obvious from standing rules and skipped retrieval. The agent's explicit Two-Mode framing + 'Do not skip it' instruction enforced full pipeline execution.
Cost of the fix: +44s mean latency (247.5s vs 203.5s), +16k tokens (71983 vs 55879). The extra work is the retrieval pipeline that was previously skipped.
Evals 2-4 were already 4/4 in iteration-1; they remain 4/4 in iteration-2 — no regression.
The agent also ran deeper in eval-4 (Nav3): 5 pages vs 4 in iteration-1, including a grep pass on the MVI Pattern page to address the open integration question. Extra thoroughness at minimal cost.
Routing table phrasing continues to work well — all 4 evals used verbatim routing table terms.
